tags.zh: 腰部以上镜头，上半身清晰可见

tags.en: medium shot, about half the body in view

tags.en: cowboy shot, from the thighs up
tags.zh: 牛仔镜头，大腿以上

tags.en: full body shot, head to toe standing pose
tags.zh: 全身镜头，从头到脚站立姿态

tags.en: wide shot, the subject within a larger environment
tags.zh: 远景，主体置身于更大的环境中

tags.en: extreme wide shot, establishing the grand setting
tags.zh: 极远景，定场展示宏大场景

tags.en: from slightly below, making the subject look powerful
tags.zh: 略偏低角度，让主体显得强大有力

tags.en: detail shot of hands, focusing on delicate gestures
tags.zh: 手部细节镜头，聚焦精致的手势

tags.en: detail shot of the eyes, the window to the soul
tags.zh: 眼部特写镜头，灵魂之窗

tags.en: half-body portrait against a textured wall
tags.zh: 半身人像，背靠有纹理的墙壁

tags.en: ankle-up shot, showing the full outfit and stance
tags.zh: 脚踝以上镜头，展示完整穿搭与站姿

tags.en: macro detail shot, extreme magnification of small objects
tags.zh: 微距细节镜头，微小物品的极端放大

tags.en: two-shot, two characters in the frame, dialogue composition
tags.zh: 双人镜头，两个角色在画框中，对话构图

tags.en: over-the-shoulder two-shot, one character's shoulder framing another
tags.zh: 过肩双人镜头，一个角色的肩膀框住另一个

tags.en: dutch angle close-up, tilted and intimate with unease
tags.zh: 斜角特写，倾斜而贴近带着不安

tags.en: front view, directly facing the viewer
tags.zh: 正面视角，直视观众

tags.en: side profile view, elegant silhouette against light
tags.zh: 侧面像视角，优雅剪影逆光

tags.en: three-quarter view, the most flattering portrait angle
tags.zh: 四分之三侧面，最讨喜的人像角度

tags.en: from behind, looking back over the shoulder with a glance
tags.zh: 背后视角，回眸一瞥

tags.en: bird's eye view, looking straight down from high above
tags.zh: 鸟瞰视角，从高空正上方俯视

tags.en: worm's eye view, looking up from ground level
tags.zh: 虫视视角，从地面向上仰望

tags.en: first person POV, seeing through the character's eyes
tags.zh: 第一人称视角，透过角色的眼睛看

tags.en: over-the-shoulder shot, immersive third person view
tags.zh: 过肩镜头，沉浸式第三人称视角

tags.en: dutch angle, tilted frame creating tension
tags.zh: 斜角构图，倾斜画框制造紧张感

tags.en: aerial drone shot, soaring view from the sky
tags.zh: 无人机航拍，翱翔于天空的视野

tags.en: top-down flat lay, neatly arranged from directly above
tags.zh: 正上方平铺，整齐排列的俯拍

tags.en: heroic low angle, looking up to make subject monumental
tags.zh: 英雄式低角度，仰拍使主体如纪念碑般

tags.en: looking out a window, framed by the window pane
tags.zh: 从窗户望出去，被窗框围合

tags.en: reflected in a mirror, self-reflection perspective
tags.zh: 镜中倒影，自我审视的视角

tags.en: through a doorway, voyeuristic peek into another room
tags.zh: 透过门框，偷窥般的另一房间视角

tags.en: view from underwater looking up at the surface
tags.zh: 水下仰视水面，气泡上升的视角

tags.en: split diopter shot, near and far both in focus simultaneously
tags.zh: 分焦镜头，近处与远处同时清晰对焦

tags.en: surveillance camera angle, grainy and voyeuristic high angle
tags.zh: 监控摄像头角度，颗粒感偷窥般的高位

tags.en: floor level view, camera placed directly on the ground
tags.zh: 地面平视，相机直接放置在地面上

tags.en: kaleidoscope perspective, fragmented mirrored repeating view
tags.zh: 万花筒视角，碎片镜像重复的视界

tags.en: rule of thirds, the focal point perfectly placed
tags.zh: 三分法构图，焦点完美置于交叉点

tags.en: center composition, the subject confidently in the middle
tags.zh: 中心构图，主体自信地居于正中

tags.en: symmetrical composition, mirror-like perfect balance
tags.zh: 对称构图，镜像般完美平衡

tags.en: diagonal composition, dynamic energy flowing across the frame
tags.zh: 对角线构图，动态能量贯穿画面

tags.en: strong leading lines drawing the eye to the subject
tags.zh: 强力引导线将视线引向主体

tags.en: frame within a frame, natural border enclosing the scene
tags.zh: 框中框构图，自然边框围合场景

tags.en: generous negative space, breathing room around the subject
tags.zh: 大量留白，主体周围有呼吸空间

tags.en: golden ratio spiral, fibonacci flow of visual harmony
tags.zh: 黄金螺旋构图，斐波那契视觉和谐流

tags.en: S-curve composition, graceful flowing line through the image
tags.zh: S形曲线构图，优雅流动的线条贯穿画面

tags.en: triangular pyramid composition, stable and monumental
tags.zh: 三角形金字塔构图，稳定庄严

tags.en: foreground elements framing and adding depth to the scene
tags.zh: 前景元素框景，为画面增加层次深度

tags.en: radial composition, elements spreading from the center
tags.zh: 放射状构图，元素从中心向外扩散

tags.en: horizon line placed low, vast sky dominating the frame
tags.zh: 地平线放低，广阔天空主导画面

tags.en: horizon line placed high, vast land dominating the frame
tags.zh: 地平线放高，广袤大地主导画面

tags.en: split composition, contrasting two halves of the image
tags.zh: 分割构图，画面两半形成鲜明对比

tags.en: tunnel composition, looking through a passage to the light beyond
tags.zh: 隧道式构图，透过通道望向远方的光

tags.en: one-point perspective, vanishing point centered for depth
tags.zh: 单点透视，消失点居中创造深度

tags.en: double framing, subject framed by foreground AND background elements
tags.zh: 双重框景，主体被前景和背景元素同时围合

tags.en: atmospheric perspective, distant elements fading into haze
tags.zh: 大气透视，远景元素渐隐入雾霾

tags.en: extreme foreground composition, foreground dominates, subject small in back
tags.zh: 极前景构图，前景占据主导，主体渺小在后

tags.en: wide angle lens, dramatic perspective exaggeration
tags.zh: 广角镜头，戏剧性的透视夸张

tags.en: fisheye lens, extreme curved distortion creative look

tags.zh: 长焦镜头，压缩透视与奶油般虚化

tags.zh: 全景宽幅，一览无余的风景比例

tags.en: portrait orientation, tall and vertical elegant framing
